headline: Jean Ziegler, Swiss sociologist and global-justice firebrand, dies at 91
summary: Swiss sociologist and former UN special rapporteur Jean Ziegler has died at 91.

headline: 13th AHV pension financing heads to reconciliation conference
summary: Swiss parliament's 13th AHV pension funding dispute escalates to an Einigungskonferenz.

headline: Geneva braces for No-G7 protest wave ahead of Evian summit
summary: Geneva finalizes No-G7 protest route and police identification ahead of the Evian G7 summit.

headline: Obwalden councillor pushes low-wage zones in French-speaking Switzerland
summary: A Council of States member from Obwalden proposes region-specific lower wage floors in Suisse romande.

headline: Swiss watch subcontracting shows first signs of recovery
summary: Acrotec group's barometer reports first signs of confidence in Swiss watchmaking subcontracting.

headline: Trump hardens Iran tone, says strikes may continue as US hits water facilities
summary: Trump says US may keep striking Iran and renews threats to civilian infrastructure; US reported to hit Iranian water facilities.

headline: Ukraine 'Flamingo' missile hits target 900km inside Russia
summary: Ukraine says its domestically built Flamingo cruise missile struck a target 900km inside Russia.

headline: Mass shooting with at least 10 attackers in Johannesburg
summary: A coordinated mass shooting with at least ten attackers was reported in Johannesburg.

headline: US diplomat found dead in Myanmar, Thai woman in custody
summary: A US diplomat was found dead in Myanmar and a Thai woman is in custody.

headline: Belfast erupts in anti-immigrant violence after knife attack
summary: Anti-immigrant unrest broke out in Belfast following a knife attack.

headline: Graham Platner wins Maine primary
summary: Graham Platner won the Maine primary election.

headline: Roxy-WI critical unauthenticated RCE CVE-2026-45558 (CVSS 9.9)
summary: Roxy-WI server-management UID has multiple critical 9.9 RCE flaws via unvalidated JSON option fields.

headline: CISA KEV adds Chromium V8, Arista EOS, and Cisco SD-WAN Manager CVEs
summary: CISA KEV adds actively exploited Chromium V8 CVE-2026-11645, Arista EOS CVE-2026-7473, and Cisco SD-WAN Manager CVE-2026-20245.

headline: Ghidra server-mode SQLi and auth-bypass flaws CVE-2026-52758
summary: NSA's Ghidra has SQL injection and PKI auth-bypass flaws in shared-server mode before 12.1.

headline: Red Hat migration tooling critical unauthenticated flaws CVE-2026-53476
summary: Red Hat assisted-migration-agent and migration-planner have critical path-traversal and JWT authorization flaws.

headline: Erlang OTP inet_drv SCTP stack overflow remote DoS CVE-2026-49759
summary: An unauthenticated SCTP ERROR chunk can crash the Erlang/OTP BEAM VM via an inet_drv stack overflow.

headline: Attention Amnesia: CoT fine-tuning breaks long-range recall in hybrid LLMs
summary: CoT supervised fine-tuning systematically degrades long-context recall in hybrid linear-attention models.

headline: ReasonAlloc: hierarchical decoding-time KV cache budgeting for reasoning models
summary: ReasonAlloc allocates KV cache budget hierarchically to cut reasoning-model inference cost.

headline: Predicting future behaviors in reasoning models enables better steering
summary: Forecasting a reasoning model's future behavior improves test-time activation steering with less quality loss.

headline: TRACE: rollout budget allocation for efficient agentic RL
summary: TRACE allocates rollout budget across tasks to make agentic RLVR training more compute-efficient.

headline: Does reasoning preserve alignment? Trustworthiness of large reasoning models
summary: Converting instruction-tuned LLMs into reasoning models often erodes their alignment and trustworthiness.

headline: ABC-Bench: agentic bio-capabilities benchmark for biosecurity
summary: ABC-Bench measures LLM agents' in-silico biology capabilities relevant to biosecurity risk.
